sentences.english: Reading is one of the best habits you can develop.
sentences.korean: 독서는 기를 수 있는 최고의 습관 중 하나예요.

sentences.english: It improves your vocabulary and helps you write better.
Reading before bed can also help you fall asleep faster.
sentences.korean: 잠자기 전 독서는 더 빨리 잠들게도 해줘요.

sentences.english: Experts recommend reading at least twenty minutes a day for these benefits.
sentences.korean: 전문가들은 이러한 이점을 위해 하루 최소 20분 독서를 권해요.

sentences.english: It doesn't matter whether you read novels comics or news articles — the important thing is to read consistently.
sentences.korean: 소설 만화 뉴스 기사 중 뭘 읽든 상관없어요 — 중요한 건 꾸준히 읽는 거예요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
